messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a cloud infrastructure migration roadmap presentation targeting C-Suite executives. Save the file as 'Cloud_Migration_Roadmap.pptx', write content in Japanese, and use 16:9 Widescreen landscape slides. The design should feature futuristic geometric blue and purple with modern layout structures. Do not make any external API calls or scrape the web; hardcode all figures locally. You must utilize XL_CHART_TYPE rather than ChartType for chart types. Also, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None before assigning text to it.

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

BG_COLOR_HEX = "#0B1426"
BLUE_HEX = "#00D4FF"
PURPLE_HEX = "#8B5CF6"
CYAN_HEX = "#06B6D4"
WHITE_HEX = "#FFFFFF"
LIGHT_GRAY_HEX = "#E2E8F0"
CARD_BG_HEX = "#1A2744"
ACCENT_PINK_HEX = "#EC4899"

FONT_PRIMARY = "Aptos"
FONT_SECONDARY = "Calibri"
TOTAL_SLIDES = 6


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(prs, slide, color_hex=BG_COLOR_HEX):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, x, y, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color_hex=WHITE_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    run.font.name = FONT_SECONDARY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, x, y, width, height, title_text="", body_text="", bg_color=CARD_BG_HEX, border_color=BLUE_HEX):
    card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, width, height)
    card_shape.fill.solid()
    card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    card_shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
    card_shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)

    if title_text:
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35),
                     title_text, font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex=BLUE_HEX)

    if body_text:
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.55), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.7),
                     body_text, font_size=11, bold=False, color_hex=LIGHT_GRAY_HEX)

    return card_shape


def add_section_label(slide, x, y, label_text):
    add_text_box(slide, x, y, Inches(4), Inches(0.35), label_text,
                 font_size=12, bold=True, color_hex=PURPLE_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=TOTAL_SLIDES):
    footer_text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(12.0), Inches(7.05), Inches(1.3), Inches(0.3),
                 footer_text, font_size=9, bold=False, color_hex="#4A5568", alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, x, y, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, x, y, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CARD_BG_HEX)
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BLUE_HEX)
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1.5)


def add_circle_indicator(slide, x, y, size, color_hex):
    circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x, y, size, size)
    circle.fill.solid()
    circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    circle.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BLUE_HEX)
    circle.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    return circle


def add_diagonal_line(slide, x1, y1, x2, y2):
    connector = slide.shapes.add_connector(1, x1, y1, x2, y2)
    connector.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BLUE_HEX)
    connector.line.width = Pt(2)


def add_title_text(slide, text, font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE_HEX):
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        run = title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].add_run()
        run.text = text
        run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        run.font.bold = bold
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
        run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(0.5), Inches(11.33), Inches(1.2),
                     text, font_size=font_size, bold=bold, color_hex=color_hex)


def create_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide)

    add_diagonal_line(slide, Inches(0), Inches(3.5), Inches(13.33), Inches(7.5))
    add_diagonal_line(slide, Inches(2), Inches(0), Inches(8), Inches(4))

    circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(9.5), Inches(0.5), Inches(1.5), Inches(1.5))
    circle.fill.solid()
    circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PURPLE_HEX)
    circle.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BLUE_HEX)
    circle.line.width = Pt(2)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.8), Inches(11.93), Inches(0.5),
                 "C-SUITE EXECUTIVE BRIEFING", font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex=PURPLE_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_title_text(slide, "クラウドインフラ移行ロードマップ", font_size=42, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE_HEX)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(3.8), Inches(11.93), Inches(0.6),
                 "Cloud Infrastructure Migration Roadmap", font_size=20, bold=False, color_hex=BLUE_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_diagonal_line(slide, Inches(4.5), Inches(4.7), Inches(8.83), Inches(4.7))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(5.2), Inches(11.93), Inches(0.5),
                 "戦略的移行計画と投資対効果の分析", font_size=16, bold=False, color_hex=LIGHT_GRAY_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(6.2), Inches(11.93), Inches(0.5),
                 "CONFIDENTIAL — 2025", font_size=11, bold=False, color_hex="#4A5568", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def create_executive_summary_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), "EXECUTIVE SUMMARY")
    add_title_text(slide, "経営概要", font_size=32, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE_HEX)
    add_diagonal_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(3.5), Inches(1.5))

    metrics = [
        ("42%", "コスト削減率\nAnnual Cost Reduction"),
        ("18ヶ月", "移行期間\nMigration Timeline"),
        ("67%", "リスク低減\nRisk Reduction"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(3.5)
    card_height = Inches(2.0)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = Inches(0.7)
    y_pos = Inches(1.9)

    for i, (metric_value, metric_desc) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, "", "")

        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.3), y_pos + Inches(0.25), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.6))
        circle.fill.solid()
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PURPLE_HEX)
        circle.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BLUE_HEX)
        circle.line.width = Pt(1.5)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y_pos + Inches(0.9), card_width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.8),
                     metric_value, font_size=28, bold=True, color_hex=BLUE_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y_pos + Inches(1.5), card_width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4),
                     metric_desc, font_size=10, bold=False, color_hex=LIGHT_GRAY_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(4.3), Inches(11.93), Inches(2.5),
                 "本移行プロジェクトは、既存オンプレミス環境からマルチクラウド基盤への戦略的移行を目的としています。\n"
                 "主要な目標は、運用コストの大幅削減、スケーラビリティの向上、セキュリティ強化、そしてビジネス継続性の確保です。\n\n"
                 "総投資額は約¥12億で、3年間で¥45億のコスト削減効果を見込んでいます。",
                 font_size=13, bold=False, color_hex=LIGHT_GRAY_HEX)

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def create_current_state_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), "CURRENT STATE")
    add_title_text(slide, "現状のインフラ評価", font_size=32, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE_HEX)
    add_diagonal_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(1.5))

    challenges = [
        "• 老朽化したオンプレミスサーバー群（平均稼働年数：8年）",
        "• 手動デプロイによる展開遅延とヒューマンエラーリスク",
        "• スケーラビリティの限界 — ピーク時のリソース不足",
        "• セキュリティインシデントが月平均3件発生中",
        "• 運用コストの年間¥8億（維持費のみ）",
    ]

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.9), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5),
                 "\n".join(challenges), font_size=13, bold=False, color_hex=LIGHT_GRAY_HEX)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["AWS", "Azure", "GCP", "オンプレ"]
    chart_data.add_series("現在のクラウド支出（億円/年）", (2.8, 1.9, 0.7, 4.6))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(6.5), Inches(1.9), Inches(6.3), Inches(4.2),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BLUE_HEX)

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(11)
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GRAY_HEX)
    cat_axis.has_major_gridlines = False

    val_axis = chart.value_axis
    val_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    val_axis.tick_labels.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GRAY_HEX)
    val_axis.has_major_gridlines = True
    val_axis.major_gridlines.format.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#1E293B")

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def create_migration_phases_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), "MIGRATION PHASES")
    add_title_text(slide, "移行フェーズ計画", font_size=32, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE_HEX)
    add_diagonal_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(3.5), Inches(1.5))

    phases = [
        ("フェーズ 1", "評価・分析", "月1-3", "現状把握\nインベントリ作成\nリスク評価"),
        ("フェーズ 2", "基盤構築", "月4-6", "クラウド設計\nセキュリティ設定\nパイロット移行"),
        ("フェーズ 3", "本移行", "月7-15", "段階的移行\nデータ転送\nテスト実施"),
        ("フェーズ 4", "最適化", "月16-18", "パフォーマンス\nコスト最適化\n運用移管"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.7)
    card_height = Inches(3.5)
    gap = Inches(0.35)
    start_x = Inches(0.7)
    y_pos = Inches(1.9)

    for i, (phase_num, phase_name, duration, activities) in enumerate(phases):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)

        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, "", "")

        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.15), y_pos + Inches(0.2), Inches(0.5), Inches(0.5))
        circle.fill.solid()
        colors = [BLUE_HEX, PURPLE_HEX, CYAN_HEX, ACCENT_PINK_HEX]
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(colors[i])
        circle.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BLUE_HEX)
        circle.line.width = Pt(1.5)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.7), y_pos + Inches(0.3), card_width - Inches(0.9), Inches(0.4),
                     phase_num, font_size=12, bold=True, color_hex=BLUE_HEX)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y_pos + Inches(0.8), card_width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.5),
                     phase_name, font_size=16, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y_pos + Inches(1.4), card_width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.3),
                     duration, font_size=12, bold=False, color_hex=PURPLE_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_diagonal_line(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y_pos + Inches(1.75), x + card_width - Inches(0.15), y_pos + Inches(1.75))

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(1.9), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(1.3),
                     activities, font_size=11, bold=False, color_hex=LIGHT_GRAY_HEX)

    if i > 0:
        for j in range(i):
            x_start = start_x + (j + 1) * (card_width + gap) - gap
            add_diagonal_line(slide, x_start, y_pos + Inches(2.7), x_start + gap, y_pos + Inches(2.7))

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def create_risk_management_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), "RISK MANAGEMENT")
    add_title_text(slide, "リスク管理と対策", font_size=32, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE_HEX)
    add_diagonal_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(1.5))

    risks = [
        ("セキュリティリスク", "HIGH", "#EF4444",
         "データ漏洩、不正アクセス、コンプライアンス違反のリスク"),
        ("運用中断", "MEDIUM", "#F59E0B",
         "移行中のサービス停止、パフォーマンス低下の可能性"),
        ("コスト超過", "LOW-MED", "#3B82F6",
         "予期せぬリソース使用による予算超過のリスク"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(3.7)
    card_height = Inches(4.0)
    gap = Inches(0.5)
    start_x = Inches(0.7)
    y_pos = Inches(1.9)

    for i, (risk_name, risk_level, level_color, description) in enumerate(risks):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)

        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, "", "")

        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.3), y_pos + Inches(0.25), Inches(0.7), Inches(0.7))
        circle.fill.solid()
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(level_color)
        circle.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BLUE_HEX)
        circle.line.width = Pt(1.5)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y_pos + Inches(1.1), card_width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4),
                     risk_name, font_size=18, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y_pos + Inches(1.5), card_width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4),
                     f"リスクレベル: {risk_level}", font_size=12, bold=True, color_hex=level_color, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_diagonal_line(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y_pos + Inches(1.95), x + card_width - Inches(0.3), y_pos + Inches(1.95))

        mitigation_text = "対策:\n"
        if i == 0:
            mitigation_text += "• 多要素認証の導入\n• データ暗号化（AES-256）\n• WAFとIDS/IPSの設定\n• 定期的な監査の実施"
        elif i == 1:
            mitigation_text += "• フェイルオーバー構成\n• 段階的移行アプローチ\n• 24時間監視体制\n• ドリル訓練の実施"
        else:
            mitigation_text += "• 詳細なコスト見積もり\n• クラウドコスト管理ツール\n• 月次レビュー体制\n• バッジエットの15%確保"

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y_pos + Inches(2.1), card_width - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7),
                     mitigation_text, font_size=11, bold=False, color_hex=LIGHT_GRAY_HEX)

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def create_financial_summary_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), "FINANCIAL SUMMARY")
    add_title_text(slide, "財務概要と次のステップ", font_size=32, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE_HEX)
    add_diagonal_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(4.0), Inches(1.5))

    chart_data_pie = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data_pie.categories = ["評価・分析", "基盤構築", "本移行", "最適化"]
    chart_data_pie.add_series("フェーズ別投資配分（億円）", (1.2, 2.8, 6.5, 1.5))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE,
        Inches(0.7), Inches(1.9), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5),
        chart_data_pie
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    colors_pie = [BLUE_HEX, PURPLE_HEX, CYAN_HEX, ACCENT_PINK_HEX]
    for idx, color in enumerate(colors_pie):
        point = series.points[idx]
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)

    legend = chart.legend
    legend.font.size = Pt(10)
    legend.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GRAY_HEX)

    metrics = [
        ("総投資額", "¥12億"),
        ("年間コスト削減", "¥45億"),
        ("ROI達成期間", "3.2ヶ月"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(3.7)
    card_height = Inches(1.0)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = Inches(6.5)
    y_start = Inches(1.9)

    for i, (metric_label, metric_value) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x
        y = y_start + i * (card_height + gap)

        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, card_height, "", "")

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.15), card_width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4),
                     metric_label, font_size=12, bold=False, color_hex=LIGHT_GRAY_HEX)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.55), card_width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.35),
                     metric_value, font_size=24, bold=True, color_hex=BLUE_HEX)

    cta_text = "次のステップ:\n" \
               "1. 移行委員会への本提案\n" \
               "2. 詳細設計フェーズの承認\n" \
               "3. パイロットプロジェクトの開始\n" \
               "4. ステークホルダーとの調整会議"

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(5.0), Inches(6.1), Inches(2.0),
                 cta_text, font_size=13, bold=False, color_hex=LIGHT_GRAY_HEX)

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    create_title_slide(prs)
    create_executive_summary_slide(prs)
    create_current_state_slide(prs)
    create_migration_phases_slide(prs)
    create_risk_management_slide(prs)
    create_financial_summary_slide(prs)

    output_file = "Cloud_Migration_Roadmap.pptx"
    prs.save(output_file)
    print(f"Presentation saved: {output_file}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
